name: Hacker News
description: Query Hacker News stories, comments, users and polls as SQL tables using the public API.

settings.label: Feed
settings.description: Which Hacker News feed to load into the stories table.

settings.label: Max Stories
settings.description: How many stories to fetch from the feed (max 500).

settings.label: Include Comments
settings.description: Load comments for each story (enables the comments table).

settings.label: Comment Depth
settings.description: How many nesting levels of comments to fetch (1–3). Higher values fetch many more requests.

settings.label: Max Comments
settings.description: Global cap on the total number of comments fetched (max 5000).

settings.label: Include Users
settings.description: Fetch author profiles (karma, bio) for all story (and comment) authors. Enables the users table.

settings.label: Include Poll Options
settings.description: Fetch voting options for poll-type stories. Enables the poll_options table.

settings.label: Timeout (s)
settings.description: HTTP request timeout in seconds for the HN API.

settings.label: Cache TTL (min)
settings.description: Automatically refresh data after this many minutes. Set to 0 to disable.
